mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, longitude, latitude FROM store_table
SELECT id, name, address, longitude, latitude FROM store_table WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_table ( name, address, longitude, latitude ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude} )
mapper.update: UPDATE store_table SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.address, s.longitude, s.latitude, 0 AS totalCnt, 0 AS remainCnt FROM store_table s ORDER BY s.id ASC
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.address, s.longitude, s.latitude, 0 AS totalCnt, 0 AS remainCnt FROM store_table s GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.address, s.longitude, s.latitude ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT pp.id, pp.store_id AS storeId, pp.name, pp.address, pp.longitude, pp.latitude, COALESCE(sdc.total_cnt, 0) AS totalCnt, COALESCE(sdc.remain_cnt, 0) AS remainCnt FROM pickup_point_table pp LEFT JOIN store_daily_capacity_table sdc ON pp.id = sdc.pickup_point_id AND sdc.pickup_date = #{pickupDate} WHERE pp.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY pp.id ASC

SELECT pp.id, pp.store_id AS storeId, pp.name, pp.address, pp.longitude, pp.latitude, COALESCE(sdc.total_cnt, 0) AS totalCnt, COALESCE(sdc.remain_cnt, 0) AS remainCnt FROM pickup_point_table pp LEFT JOIN store_daily_capacity_table sdc ON pp.id = sdc.pickup_point_id AND sdc.pickup_date = #{pickupDate} WHERE pp.latitude BETWEEN #{south} AND #{north} AND pp.longitude BETWEEN #{west} AND #{east} ORDER BY pp.id ASC

SELECT pp.id, pp.store_id AS storeId, pp.name, pp.address, pp.longitude, pp.latitude, COALESCE(sdc.total_cnt, 0) AS totalCnt, COALESCE(sdc.remain_cnt, 0) AS remainCnt FROM pickup_point_table pp LEFT JOIN store_daily_capacity_table sdc ON pp.id = sdc.pickup_point_id AND sdc.pickup_date = #{pickupDate} WHERE pp.id = #{pickupPointId}
